summary: Iteration 227 - Backend Refactoring Verification. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). All critical endpoints working after auto-router discovery refactor. GZip compression verified. MongoDB indexes created on startup. Frontend: Divine Director page loads correctly at /suanpan route.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: Auto-router discovery via pkgutil.iter_modules correctly loads all 120+ route modules
server.py: GZip middleware (minimum_size=500) working - verified with Content-Encoding: gzip header
db_indexes.py: MongoDB indexes created on startup - logs show 'All database indexes created/verified successfully'
tasks.py: Background tasks (push_scheduler_loop, credit_refresh_loop) extracted and running
deps.py: MongoDB connection pooling optimized (maxPoolSize=50, minPoolSize=5)
WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/sync manually registered in server.py (correct - not auto-discovered)
Stripe webhook /api/webhook/stripe manually registered in server.py (correct - not auto-discovered)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Refactor_227_Project and TEST_Ripple_227_Project during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 227 verified backend refactoring: (1) Auto-router discovery via pkgutil.iter_modules loads all route modules from /app/backend/routes/. (2) GZip compression middleware active (minimum_size=500 bytes). (3) MongoDB indexes created on startup via db_indexes.py. (4) Background tasks (push_scheduler_loop, credit_refresh_loop) extracted to tasks.py and running. (5) MongoDB connection pooling optimized (maxPoolSize=50, minPoolSize=5). (6) All critical endpoints tested: POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/auth/me, GET /api/dashboard/stats, GET /api/mixer/subscription, GET /api/mixer/sources, GET /api/mixer/recommendations, GET /api/mixer/projects, POST /api/mixer/projects, POST /api/mixer/projects/ripple, GET /api/mixer/bonus-packs, GET /api/energy-gates/status, GET /api/subscriptions/my-plan. (7) Frontend: Divine Director page at /suanpan loads correctly with ULTRA PLAYER tier badge.

auto_router_discovery.details: pkgutil.iter_modules correctly loads all 120+ route modules from /app/backend/routes/

gzip_compression.details: GZip middleware active - Content-Encoding: gzip header present on responses > 500 bytes

mongodb_indexes.details: Indexes created on startup - logs show 'All database indexes created/verified successfully'

background_tasks.details: push_scheduler_loop and credit_refresh_loop running - logs show 'Push scheduler loop started' and 'Credit refresh loop started'

mongodb_connection_pooling.details: Connection pooling optimized (maxPoolSize=50, minPoolSize=5) - 5 rapid requests completed in ~11s

auth_login.details: POST /api/auth/login returns token and user data

auth_me.details: GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token

dashboard_stats.details: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns mood_count, journal_count, streak, recent_moods, sparkline, scripture

mixer_subscription.details: GET /api/mixer/subscription returns tier, tier_config, comparison, all_tiers

mixer_sources.details: GET /api/mixer/sources returns sources list gated by subscription tier

mixer_projects.details: GET /api/mixer/projects returns project list, POST creates/updates projects

mixer_ripple_edit.details: POST /api/mixer/projects/ripple shifts unlocked subsequent tracks by duration delta

mixer_bonus_packs.details: GET /api/mixer/bonus-packs returns pack list with ownership status

divine_director_frontend.details: Divine Director page at /suanpan loads correctly with ULTRA PLAYER tier badge
